zh.lifeSummary: 當Ieuan ap Rhys於大約1300年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾朋德林時，他的父親Rhys ap Ifor26歲，母親Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor24歲。他於大約1329年與Gwladys ferch Dafydd在威爾士布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年在威爾士布雷康史爾布盧德享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ieuan ap Rhys于大约1300年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾朋德林时，他的父亲Rhys ap Ifor26岁，母亲Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor24岁。他于大约1329年与Gwladys ferch Dafydd在威尔士布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年在威尔士布雷康史爾布盧德享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Ieuan ap Rhys was born about 1300, in Penderyn, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Rhys ap Ifor, was 26 and his mother, Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, was 24. He married Gwladys ferch Dafydd about 1329, in Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1367, in Boughrood, Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 68.

fr.of Ynys Cynlas,Glasbury,Radnorshire,Wale: Glasbury, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ieuan ap Rhys est né environ 1300, à Penderyn, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Rhys ap Ifor, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys ferch Dafydd environ 1329, à Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1367, à Boughrood, Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ieuan ap Rhys um 1300 in Penderyn, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Ifor 26 und seine Mutter Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor 24. Er hat um 1329 in Breconshire, Wales Gwladys ferch Dafydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1367 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Boughrood, Breconshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ieuan ap Rhys è nato il circa 1300 nel Penderyn, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys ap Ifor, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gwladys ferch Dafydd circa 1329, nel Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1367, nel Boughrood, Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Rhysが約1300年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアペンデリンで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Iforは26歳，母Mrs Rhys Ap Iforは24歳であった。約1329年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアでGwladys ferch Dafyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアボウルーッドで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Rhys(이)가 대략 1300년 웨일스 브레콘실르 펜더이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Ifor(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Gwladys ferch Dafydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 웨일스 브레콘실르 부그h루드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ieuan ap Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Penderyn, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Ifor, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladys ferch Dafydd aproximadamente 1329, em Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1367, em Boughrood, Breconshire, Gales, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ieuan ap Rhys родился около 1300 г. в местности пендирин, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Ifor было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys ferch Dafydd около 1329 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1367 г. в местности боугруд, брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ieuan ap Rhys nació aproximadamente 1300, en Penderyn, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Ifor, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs Rhys Ap Ifor, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gwladys ferch Dafydd aproximadamente 1329, en Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1367, en Boughrood, Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 68 años.
